'''fozhasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadannual|quadannual]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-zh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadannual|quadannual]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fozhasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fozhasithi|fozhasithi]] || [[word:fozhasiji|fozhasiji]] || [[word:fozhasishi|fozhasishi]] || [[word:fozhasiki|fozhasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fozhasuthuthu|fozhasuthuthu]] || [[word:fozhasujuju|fozhasujuju]] || [[word:fozhasushushu|fozhasushushu]] || [[word:fozhasukuku|fozhasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fozhasuthu|fozhasuthu]] || [[word:fozhasuju|fozhasuju]] || [[word:fozhasushu|fozhasushu]] || [[word:fozhasuku|fozhasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fozhasufthuf|fozhasufthuf]] || [[word:fozhasufjuf|fozhasufjuf]] || [[word:fozhasufshuf|fozhasufshuf]] || [[word:fozhasufkuf|fozhasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fozhasethe|fozhasethe]] || [[word:fozhaseje|fozhaseje]] || [[word:fozhaseshe|fozhaseshe]] || [[word:fozhaseke|fozhaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fozhasothotho|fozhasothotho]] || [[word:fozhasojojo|fozhasojojo]] || [[word:fozhasoshosho|fozhasoshosho]] || [[word:fozhasokoko|fozhasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fozhasotho|fozhasotho]] || [[word:fozhasojo|fozhasojo]] || [[word:fozhasosho|fozhasosho]] || [[word:fozhasoko|fozhasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fozhasofthof|fozhasofthof]] || [[word:fozhasofjof|fozhasofjof]] || [[word:fozhasofshof|fozhasofshof]] || [[word:fozhasofkof|fozhasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fozhasïfthïf|fozhasïfthïf]] || [[word:fozhasïfjïf|fozhasïfjïf]] || [[word:fozhasïfshïf|fozhasïfshïf]] || [[word:fozhasïfkïf|fozhasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fozhasïfthïfthïf|fozhasïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:fozhasïfjïfjïf|fozhasïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:fozhasïfshïfshïf|fozhasïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:fozhasïfkïfkïf|fozhasïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fozhasïfthïf|fozhasïfthïf]] || [[word:fozhasïfjïf|fozhasïfjïf]] || [[word:fozhasïfshïf|fozhasïfshïf]] || [[word:fozhasïfkïf|fozhasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fozhasïfthïf|fozhasïfthïf]] || [[word:fozhasïfjïf|fozhasïfjïf]] || [[word:fozhasïfshïf|fozhasïfshïf]] || [[word:fozhasïfkïf|fozhasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fozhasæthæ|fozhasæthæ]] || [[word:fozhasæjæ|fozhasæjæ]] || [[word:fozhasæshæ|fozhasæshæ]] || [[word:fozhasækæ|fozhasækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fozhasathatha|fozhasathatha]] || [[word:fozhasajaja|fozhasajaja]] || [[word:fozhasashasha|fozhasashasha]] || [[word:fozhasakaka|fozhasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fozhasatha|fozhasatha]] || [[word:fozhasaja|fozhasaja]] || [[word:fozhasasha|fozhasasha]] || [[word:fozhasaka|fozhasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fozhasafthaf|fozhasafthaf]] || [[word:fozhasafjaf|fozhasafjaf]] || [[word:fozhasafshaf|fozhasafshaf]] || [[word:fozhasafkaf|fozhasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fozhasasha|fozhasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fozhashësha|fozhashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fozhasrosha|fozhasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fozhasmusha|fozhasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fozhasyasha|fozhasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofozhasnkshësha|gofozhasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofozhasnkrosha|gofozhasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofozhasnkmusha|gofozhasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofozhasnkyasha|gofozhasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fozhazhasasha|fozhazhasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fozhazhashësha|fozhazhashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fozhazhasrosha|fozhazhasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fozhazhasmusha|fozhazhasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fozhazhasyasha|fozhazhasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofozhazhasnkshësha|gofozhazhasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofozhazhasnkrosha|gofozhazhasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofozhazhasnkmusha|gofozhazhasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofozhazhasnkyasha|gofozhazhasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fezhæsasha|fezhæsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fezhæshësha|fezhæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fezhæsrosha|fezhæsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fezhæsmusha|fezhæsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fezhæsyasha|fezhæsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofezhæsnkshësha|gofezhæsnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofezhæsnkrosha|gofezhæsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofezhæsnkmusha|gofezhæsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofezhæsnkyasha|gofezhæsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fozhfasasha|fozhfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fozhfashësha|fozhfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fozhfasrosha|fozhfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fozhfasmusha|fozhfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fozhfasyasha|fozhfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofozhfasnkshësha|gofozhfasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofozhfasnkrosha|gofozhfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofozhfasnkmusha|gofozhfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofozhfasnkyasha|gofozhfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
